terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.1: This promotion applies to new Vwin players from 06/01/2026 00:00:00 (GMT+8).
terms.2: The first 300 players who register an account will receive 88 free spins on Wealth of the East (Ela Games).
terms.3: Free spins will be credited once (1x) throughout the promo period with the qualifying registration. Credited free spins will expire 7 days after issuance.
terms.4: Free spins winnings must be wagered forty times (40x) on Casino Slots within 7 days prior to withdrawal.
terms.5: Winnings from free spins are capped at $50. Any winnings that exceed the capped amount will be forfeited.
terms.6: Only Casino Slots games will count towards wagering contribution. List of included casino slots games are provided under General Terms and Conditions.
terms.7: Withdrawal will only be processed once a player no longer has any active wagering requirement.
terms.8: Player can request a waiver of the rollover requirement by contacting Customer Service.
terms.9: Vwin reserves the right to change, update, modify, or cancel this promotion at any time without prior notice
